title: asplenium ruta-muraria var. alternifolium
intro: Asplenium ruta-muraria var. alternifolium, also known as Wall Rue, is a type of fern that belongs to the Aspleniaceae family. It is primarily used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Wall Rue include its ability to treat conditions such as diarrhea, fever, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to boost the immune system. Wall Rue is traditionally prepared as an herbal tea or infusion, and it can also be used in the form of a tincture or poultice to treat various health conditions.
